title: Device Settings - Do Not Disturb
scenario: Do Not Disturb toggle in Device Settings controls red LED indicator on headset when Wear Sensor is off
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and pair your Poly Bluetooth headset.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Tap the Do Not Disturb tab.
4. Verify the Do Not Disturb tab is present and expanded, displaying a toggle switch and the description: "Enable the indicator on your headset to inform others that you are not to be interrupted."
5. Set the Do Not Disturb toggle to ON.
6. Verify the toggle changes to the ON position.
7. Ensure Wear Sensor is turned OFF, then verify the LEDs on the headset blink red.
8. Set the Do Not Disturb toggle to OFF.
9. Verify the toggle changes to the OFF position and the LEDs on the headset turn off.
expected: 1. Do Not Disturb tab is present and expanded with toggle and description. 2. Toggle changes to ON and LEDs blink red (with Wear Sensor off). 3. Toggle changes to OFF and LEDs turn off.
